name: East Lake Park
description: East Lake Park is a place to play pickleball in Mount Pleasant, IA. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Mt. Pleasant Pickleball Courts
description: Mt. Pleasant Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Mount Pleasant, IA. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at The Rec Center in Mount Pleasant, IA! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.
